message:
feat(expr): add incremental view maintenance with delta propagation

Implements AG-15: Delta type for append-only changes, MaterializedView
with cached evaluation state, and incremental apply_delta that only
recomputes new rows for linear expressions (series refs, additions).
Isomorphism proof: incremental output == full re-evaluation. 6 new tests.

Closes: bd-2t5e.15 (AG-15)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
